message:
Command `MCU_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"
WRAPPER_RUN="$MCU_DIR/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

echo "=== Error context from GlobalPlacement log ==="
GP_LOG="$WRAPPER_RUN/24-openroad-globalplacement/openroad-globalplacementskipio.log"
[ -f "$GP_LOG" ] && tail -30 "$GP_LOG" || echo "GP log not found"
echo ""

echo "=== IO placement log - unplaced ports ==="
IO_LOG=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/21-openroad-ioplacement/"*.log 2>/dev/null | head -1)
[ -n "$IO_LOG" ] && grep -i "unplace\|not placed\|clk_amux\|WARNING\|ERROR" "$IO_LOG" | head -20 || echo "IO log not found"
echo ""

echo "=== DEF template: does it define clk_amuxbus_a? ==="
grep -i "clk_amux" "$MCU_DIR/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/fixed_dont_change/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.def" | head -5 || echo "Not in DEF template"
echo ""

echo "=== Wrapper.v: any clk_amux reference? ==="
grep -i "clk_amux" "$MCU_DIR/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v" | head -5 || echo "Not in wrapper.v"
echo ""

echo "=== Synthesis netlist: clk_amux as top port? ==="
grep -i "clk_amux" "$WRAPPER_RUN/02-yosys-synthesis/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.nl.v" | head -10 || echo "Not in netlist"` executed with exit code 0.

{"command": "MCU_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"
WRAPPER_RUN="$MCU_DIR/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

echo "=== Error context from GlobalPlacement log ==="

[ -f "$GP_LOG" ] && tail -30 "$GP_LOG" || echo "GP log not found"
echo ""

echo "=== IO placement log - unplaced ports ==="
IO_LOG=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/21-openroad-ioplacement/"*.log 2>/dev/null | head -1)
[ -n "$IO_LOG" ] && grep -i "unplace\|not placed\|clk_amux\|WARNING\|ERROR" "$IO_LOG" | head -20 || echo "IO log not found"
echo ""

echo "=== DEF template: does it define clk_amuxbus_a? ==="
grep -i "clk_amux" "$MCU_DIR/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/fixed_dont_change/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.def" | head -5 || echo "Not in DEF template"
echo ""

echo "=== Wrapper.v: any clk_amux reference? ==="
grep -i "clk_amux" "$MCU_DIR/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v" | head -5 || echo "Not in wrapper.v"
echo ""

echo "=== Synthesis netlist: clk_amux as top port? ==="
grep -i "clk_amux" "$WRAPPER_RUN/02-yosys-synthesis/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.nl.v" | head -10 || echo "Not in netlist"", "timeout": 15}
function.name: execute_bash

content:
=== Error context from GlobalPlacement log ===
GP log not found

=== IO placement log - unplaced ports ===
IO log not found

=== DEF template: does it define clk_amuxbus_a? ===

=== Wrapper.v: any clk_amux reference? ===
    inout clk_amuxbus_a,
    inout clk_amuxbus_b,

=== Synthesis netlist: clk_amux as top port? ===
, clk_pad_a_esd_0_h, clk_pad_a_esd_1_h, clk_pad_a_noesd_h, clk_amuxbus_a, clk_amuxbus_b, clk_tie_hi_esd, clk_tie_lo_esd, reset_n_xres_h_n, reset_n_disable_pullup_h, reset_n_enable_h, reset_n_enable_vddio, reset_n_en_vddio_sig_h, reset_n_filt_in_h, reset_n_inp_sel_h, reset_n_pullup_h, reset_n_tie_weak_hi_h, reset_n_pad_a_esd_0_h, reset_n_pad_a_noesd_h, reset_n_amuxbus_a, reset_n_amuxbus_b, reset_n_tie_hi_esd
  inout clk_amuxbus_a;
  wire clk_amuxbus_a;
  inout clk_amuxbus_b;
  wire clk_amuxbus_b;
